text.message: last game someone got 3 vps 2 monos 3 knights
you knew how valuable it was to me too
it comes at a cost though sir
the 2-1 trade there with black was not a good idea imo
not robbing strongest position is lame af
ive hit black every time except the very start
so they had to trade with black
that trade just didnt help me, i needed the brick
you don't play for the game
you play for your current turn
can you double block me and blue
you can still rob from me
and the 4 doesnt hurt either of u much
don't get too tunnel visioned on the player who had lucky rolls to start the game with
i mean ur on every resource and ur getting road
so its u fs right now
blue is on 6, I could be on 6
green what happened to "playing for the game" man
crazy to throw over one rob on the first turn
like I said, you can still rob me but I think double block is fair
and blue is also 3 roads away from a great connect
I have no city and no chance to get one
i think its the 10 for the moment sry black
you have sheep and wood port brother
can yall report green for kingmaking btw
and ur trading the leader eery turn
now that I have the settle
I don't need to block you
u do what u want green its fine, just not sure how its fun for u to play this way
aren't we being too lenient with blue?
I get the rob, don't get the solo
I have literally 1 card in hand
they don't want to pace army
its prob blue now i agree
dang those rolls are tuff tho
can you take road with this trade green?
just report and move on blue
game been cooked from the start
without road, I am on 6. Blue on 9
who are u talking to black?
i cant move the robber and green only robs me
don't think he robbed blue ever
green could sneak road now lol
blue takes road and pulls for the win
Catan is a game of coordination and communication
u have an open settle ftw as well
one settle win for black lol
I lose road before I can even go for the settle
so blue on 8 and 1 road from winning
you on 9 and 1 settle from winning
yeah, but 4 cards off a settle
you are like 1 8 roll away from winning
I hate that the table talker wins
the sadest part of the game
I don't have any winning rolls
the only one throwing this game is green guys lmao
i reported already its fine blue
you focused too much on me
